channel.title: Dania Awin — Essays & Research
channel.description: Essays and public research on institutional power, technology and culture by Dania Awin.

item.title: Accountability as an Act of Love
item.description: On the difference between punishment and accountability — and why holding someone to account with love can be one of the most tender forms of regard.
item.author: noreply@daniaawin.com (Dania Awin)

item.title: When inclusion becomes language and stops at power
item.description: On institutions that speak diversity and keep their hierarchies — and why DEI so often becomes language without redistribution of power.
item.author: noreply@daniaawin.com (Dania Awin)

item.title: Reloading: decolonial narratives within the blockchain
item.description: Research into how the NFT exhibition Reloading engages with decolonial narratives within blockchain technology. Does this technology dismantle or reproduce existing power structures?
item.author: noreply@daniaawin.com (Dania Awin)
